problem_35.natural_language: A metric space with extended diameter `0` consists of a single element.
problem_35.lean:
theorem subsingleton_of_ediam_univ_eq_zero
    {X : Type*} [MetricSpace X]
    (h : Metric.ediam (Set.univ : Set X) = 0) :
    Subsingleton X
problem_35.natural_language_proof:
Proof: by `Metric.ediam_eq_zero_iff`, a set has extended diameter `0` if and only if it is a
subsingleton. Applying this to `Set.univ` shows that `Set.univ` is a subsingleton set, so every two
elements of `X` are equal. Hence `X` is a subsingleton.
